name: Five Rivers Bank
description_short: Community bank based in Paramus, NJ offering personal and business banking, lending, and CDs with a focus on local relationships and rapid decision-making.
description_long: Five Rivers Bank is a community-focused bank headquartered in Paramus, Bergen County, New Jersey. The bank positions itself as relationship-driven, emphasizing direct access to leadership and understanding of local community needs. Founded on the principle that banking can be done better through listening and local engagement, Five Rivers Bank operates with a mission-driven approach that extends beyond traditional banking services. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of financial products across personal and business segments. Personal banking includes checking and savings accounts with secure online and mobile access, plus free ATM withdrawals. Business banking provides tiered interest checking, money market, and savings accounts with flexible balance requirements. On the lending side, Five Rivers Bank offers consumer loans for personal needs, credit lines, and secured lending options, as well as commercial lending for property, equipment, and working capital financing. Certificate of Deposit (CD) products are prominently featured, with advertised 6-month CD rates at 4.10% APY (minimum $500 deposit). Five Rivers Bank differentiates itself through several stated advantages: rapid response times due to local lending authority, direct access to experienced banking leaders, transparent fee structures without rigid rules, proactive solutions developed in coordination with accountants and partners, and advanced financial management tools. The bank has also committed to allocating 10% of net profits to community investment and philanthropy in Bergen County, positioning itself as a hyperlocal civic participant. Mobile banking capabilities allow customers to manage accounts remotely. As a community bank, Five Rivers Bank's reach and product depth are limited compared to national institutions. While the bank emphasizes relationship-based banking and local decision-making, customers seeking extensive branch networks, specialized investment products, or nationally competitive rates may find limited options. The bank's strength lies in personalized service and community engagement rather than scale or product breadth. Prospective customers should verify current rates and specific terms, as advertised rates are subject to change.
services: Personal checking accounts with online and mobile access
Personal savings accounts with secure banking
Business checking accounts with tiered interest rates
Business savings accounts with flexible balance requirements
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with advertised 4.10% APY for 6-month terms
Personal consumer loans with competitive rates
Personal credit lines and secured lending options
Free ATM access for personal and business accounts
Mobile banking app for account management on-the-go
pros: Direct access to banking leadership and local lending authority for faster loan decisions
Transparent fee structure with no rigid rules, emphasizing fair and flexible terms
6-month CD rate of 4.10% APY with $500 minimum deposit
Free ATM withdrawals for both personal and business accounts
Comprehensive lending options including personal loans, credit lines, and commercial financing
Mobile and online banking with secure access for remote account management
Commitment to community reinvestment with 10% of net profits allocated to Bergen County philanthropy
Proactive approach to problem-solving in coordination with accountants and business partners
cons: Limited geographic footprint as a single-location community bank in Paramus, NJ with no branch network mentioned
CD rates and other competitive rates require direct contact—not all terms publicly listed on website
No mention of investment products, wealth management, or specialized financial services beyond basic banking and lending
Early withdrawal penalties on CDs may reduce earnings, though specific penalty structure not detailed
Limited information about business loan products, SBA lending, or commercial credit line specifics
best_for: Small to mid-sized businesses in Bergen County seeking relationship-based lending and flexible terms
Individuals and families seeking local banking with direct access to decision-makers
Savers looking for competitive CD rates with community bank personalized service
Entrepreneurs who value proactive financial partnership and coordination with their accountant
diagnosis: Five Rivers Bank is best suited for Bergen County residents and small-to-mid-sized business owners who prioritize personalized service, local decision-making, and community connection over national scale and product breadth. The main caveat is that as a single-location community bank, it lacks branch convenience and may have limited product specialization compared to larger institutions; customers should verify current rates and loan product details directly, as the website provides limited specifics on commercial lending terms and account minimums beyond CDs.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_mdi_status: Minority Board and Serving Asian or Pacific Islander Community
